trending_topics.context: 2 posts, 9.11x baseline rate — mentioning Hedera, Ethereum, ETH

sample_posts.text:
Hedera Network Reportedly Exploited, $5.25M in Stolen Funds Already Bridged to Ethereum.
Source:
https://x.com/PeckShieldAlert/status/2075867053408629179

tweet.text:
#PeckShieldAlert  Specter has reported that @hedera Network appeared to be exploited, with $5.25M in stolen funds already bridged from #Hedera Mainnet to Ethereum.

The hacker originally funded 1 ETH from #TornadoCash and now holds 2.36K ETH ($4.25M) & 15.58 WBTC ($1M) in the wallet.

sample_posts.text:
The Hedera network is suspected of being continuously hacked, with stolen funds exceeding $3.7 million.

trending_topics.context: 2 posts, 2.55x baseline rate — mentioning Hedera, BlackRock, Ethereum, Bitcoin

sample_posts.text:
The Hedera network is suspected of being continuously hacked, with stolen funds exceeding $3.7 million.
SOURCE

Bitcoin ETF inflows resume; July 10 saw $90.4M net inflow –
Link
After Thursday's $95.3 million outflow, Bitcoin spot ETFs posted a $90.4 million net inflow on July 10. BlackRock's IBIT led with $86.8 million, while Ethereum ETFs saw $18.4 million of inflows.
Matters because:
The reversal suggests renewed institutional demand and may help support price stability above $63,000.

thesis_movers.statement: Sonic Labs stalls as a credible DeFi hub following Andre Cronje's board resignation and broader market uncertainty in H2 2026

top_evidence.snippet:
Andre Cronje resigns from Sonic Labs board –
Link
Andre Cronje, along with
Michael Kong
and
David Richardson
, resigned from the Sonic Labs board. The
S
token is trading about
97% below
its all-time high.
Matters because:
Cronje's exit is a significant governance event that may further weigh on S token sentiment and ecosystem confidence.

sample_posts.text:
Bitcoin ETF inflows resume; July 10 saw $90.4M net inflow –
Link
After Thursday's $95.3 million outflow, Bitcoin spot ETFs posted a $90.4 million net inflow on July 10. BlackRock's IBIT led with $86.8 million, while Ethereum ETFs saw $18.4 million of inflows.
Matters because:
The reversal suggests renewed institutional demand and may help support price stability above $63,000.

Daily news snapshot: Altcoins watchlist
1. Arbitrum (ARB): +20%
• Market cap: ≈$3.5 billion
• ARB surged about 20% on July 10 after Robinhood Chain launched using Arbitrum as its underlying technology provider.
Catalysts:
• Robinhood Chain will allocate 10% of its protocol net revenue back to the Arbitrum ecosystem.
• The move highlights ecosystem expansion and revenue-sharing mechanics.
• Current activity remains primarily meme-coin driven.
Matters because:
The Robinhood Chain tie-in gives Arbitrum a clear ecosystem catalyst, though the current usage mix is still largely speculative.
2. Cash
